note_en: Predictions are my (Opus 4.8) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. 1X2 odds from FanDuel/bet365 (30 Jun); score odds are market-derived estimates. Scratch a panel to reveal my exact score call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Opus 4.8）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。胜平负赔率来源：FanDuel/bet365（6 月 30 日）；比分赔率为市场推算估值。刮开面板揭晓我的精准比分预测。

record.note_en: Opus match-outcome calls scored from Matchday 3 onward. Updated daily. ⭐ = exact scoreline. ✓ = correct outcome.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮起对 Opus 胜负预测计分，每日更新。⭐ = 比分全中，✓ = 结果正确。

log.label_zh: 阿尔及利亚 3-3 奥地利
刚果（金）3-1 乌兹别克斯坦

champions.reason_en: Perfect 9-pt group; R32 vs Sweden tonight — comfortable on paper. Mbappé and Dembélé in sync; most complete attacking unit left in the draw.
champions.reason_zh: 全胜 9 分小组赛；今晚 32 强战瑞典——纸面轻松。姆巴佩与登贝莱默契配合；现存最完整的进攻体系。

champions.reason_en: Won Group H (1-0 Uruguay, Baena); R32 vs Austria July 2, LA. Yamal's creativity and Baena's energy keep the press relentless. Clear favourites.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 H 组头名（1-0 乌拉圭，巴埃纳）；7 月 2 日 32 强战奥地利，洛杉矶。亚马尔的创造力与巴埃纳的能量令逼抢不息。

champions.reason_en: Perfect group (9 pts); R32 vs Cape Verde July 3, Miami. Messi's record 7th WC goal; path as open as it gets.
champions.reason_zh: 全胜小组赛（9 分）；7 月 3 日 32 强战佛得角，迈阿密。梅西创史无前例的第 7 次世界杯进球；签位极其宽松。

champions.reason_en: Defeated Japan 2-1 (Casemiro, Martinelli) in R32 — clinical and composed. Vinícius leading a potent attack; Brazil look like serious title contenders.
champions.reason_zh: 32 强 2-1 淘汰日本（卡塞米罗、马丁内利）——精准从容。维尼修斯领衔强力锋线；巴西是认真的冠军争夺者。

champions.reason_en: Won Group L (2-0 Panama); R32 vs DR Congo July 1, Atlanta. Kane in form; path toughens toward quarters but first hurdle is manageable.
champions.reason_zh: 夺 L 组头名（2-0 巴拿马）；7 月 1 日 32 强战刚果（金），亚特兰大。凯恩状态佳；赛程越走越难，但首关可控。

champions.reason_en: Shocked Netherlands 3-2 on pens (Diop equaliser 91', Bounou saves). R16 vs Canada July 4, Houston. The Atlas Lions are a genuine dark horse.
champions.reason_zh: 点球 3-2 力克荷兰（迪奥普 91 分钟扳平，布努神扑）。7 月 4 日 16 强战加拿大，休斯顿。阿特拉斯雄狮是真正的黑马。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: Free-kick goal vs Jordan — record 7 straight WC goals. Argentina's perfect group; R32 vs Cape Verde July 3, Miami. Eyes both Golden Boot and the trophy.
players.reason_zh: 任意球破约旦——连续 7 场世界杯进球，史无前例。阿根廷全胜；7 月 3 日 32 强战佛得角。金靴与冠军皆在视野中。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: France swept Group I; razor form alongside Dembélé; R32 vs Sweden tonight. If France go deep, Mbappé's goal tally should climb sharply.
players.reason_zh: 法国全胜横扫 I 组；与登贝莱相映，状态锋利；今晚 32 强战瑞典。如法国走远，姆巴佩进球数将急速攀升。

players.name: Erling Haaland
players.reason_en: Golden Boot leader (6 goals in group stage); Norway face Ivory Coast tonight in Dallas. One good run and Haaland goes clear at the top.
players.reason_zh: 领跑金靴（小组赛 6 球）；挪威今晚战科特迪瓦，达拉斯。一旦保持节奏，哈兰德将将众人甩开。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain won Group H; R32 vs Austria July 2, LA. Creative spark in a side built to go deep — if Spain reach the semis, Yamal's stat line will dazzle.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙夺 H 组头名；7 月 2 日 32 强战奥地利，洛杉矶。志在深入球队中的创造力核心——若西班牙杀入四强，亚马尔数据将令人瞠目。

players.name: Harry Kane
players.reason_en: England won Group L (2-0 Panama); R32 vs DR Congo July 1, Atlanta. Kane reliable from open play and set pieces; needs goals to build a Golden Boot push.
players.reason_zh: 英格兰夺 L 组头名（2-0 巴拿马）；7 月 1 日 32 强战刚果（金），亚特兰大。凯恩运动战与定位球均稳；需要进球推进金靴竞争。

players.name: Mohamed Salah
players.reason_en: Egypt advanced 2nd in Group G (1-1 Iran); R32 vs Australia July 3, Dallas. Salah capable of lighting up any stage; Egypt are dark-horse to reach the quarters.
players.reason_zh: 埃及以 G 组次席出线（1-1 伊朗）；7 月 3 日 32 强战澳大利亚，达拉斯。萨拉赫在任何舞台都能爆发；埃及是黑马。

fixtures.reason_en: 2E vs 2I. Haaland's firepower and Norway's directness edge a strong Ivory Coast in a tight, end-to-end tie. Haaland adds to his Golden Boot lead.
fixtures.reason_zh: E 组次席对 I 组次席。哈兰德的火力与挪威的直接打法，在你来我往的胶着战中力压强劲的科特迪瓦。哈兰德继续扩大金靴领先优势。

fixtures.reason_en: 1I vs 3F. France's perfect group and attacking depth overwhelm a third-placed Sweden that backed into the R32. Comfortable French win.
fixtures.reason_zh: I 组头名对 F 组第三。法国的全胜小组赛与攻击厚度碾压勉强以第三身份晋级的瑞典。法国轻取。

fixtures.reason_en: 1A vs 3E. Mexico at the Azteca with 80,000+ fans — one of sport's great fortress atmospheres. Ecuador upset Germany but facing a co-host on their iconic ground is a different beast. Mexico advances.
fixtures.reason_zh: A 组头名对 E 组第三。墨西哥坐镇阿兹特克球场，8 万余主场球迷——体育界最具威压的主场氛围之一。厄瓜多尔能赢德国，但在东道主的图腾球场作客是另一回事。墨西哥晋级。

fixtures.reason_en: 1L vs 3K. England topped their group with Kane in form; DR Congo showed quality (3-1 Uzbekistan) but the step up to England is significant. Straightforward English win.
fixtures.reason_zh: L 组头名对 K 组第三。英格兰头名出线，凯恩进球状态佳；刚果（金）展现质素（3-1 乌兹别克斯坦）但对阵英格兰跨度太大。英格兰轻取。

fixtures.reason_en: 1G vs 3I. Belgium won their group convincingly (5-1 NZ); Senegal made best-third via a 5-0 Iraq win but Belgian depth is clearly superior. Expect Senegal to push before Belgium pull clear.
fixtures.reason_zh: G 组头名对 I 组第三。比利时强势夺头名（5-1 新西兰）；塞内加尔凭 5-0 伊拉克以第三身份出线，但比利时阵容深度明显占优。预计塞内加尔会竞争一番，但比利时最终拉开。

fixtures.reason_en: 1D vs 3B. USA at Levi's Stadium, San Francisco — co-host home support. Despite the Turkey shock loss, USA won Group D. Bosnia advanced as best-third; USA's depth and crowd advantage should prevail.
fixtures.reason_zh: D 组头名对 B 组第三。美国坐镇旧金山利维斯球场——东道主主场优势。尽管爆冷负土耳其，美国仍夺 D 组头名。波黑以第三身份出线；美国阵容深度与主场优势应占上风。

fixtures.reason_en: 1H vs 2J. Spain won Group H convincingly with Yamal and Baena sparkling; Austria scraped 2nd in Group J with just 4 pts. Spanish technical superiority should make this comfortable.
fixtures.reason_zh: H 组头名对 J 组次席。西班牙全胜夺头名，亚马尔与巴埃纳灵光闪现；奥地利在艰难的 J 组仅凭 4 分险夺次席。西班牙技术优势将令比赛轻松。

fixtures.reason_en: 2K vs 2L. Euro 2016 final rematch — Ronaldo vs Modric. Portugal's individual quality and attacking depth edge Croatia's defensive organisation. Expect intensity; Portugal to edge a close tie.
fixtures.reason_zh: K 组次席对 L 组次席。欧洲杯 2016 决赛重演——C 罗对阵莫德里奇。葡萄牙的个人质量与进攻厚度险胜克罗地亚的防守体系。预计全程高强度；葡萄牙险胜。

fixtures.reason_en: 1B vs 3J. Switzerland won Group B convincingly (7 pts, 3-1 Canada); Algeria advanced as best-third after the 3-3 draw with Austria. Swiss organisation and discipline should control this tie.
fixtures.reason_zh: B 组头名对 J 组第三。瑞士强势夺 B 组头名（7 分，3-1 加拿大）；阿尔及利亚凭 3-3 奥地利后最佳第三出线。瑞士的阵型严密与纪律性应主导比赛。

fixtures.reason_en: 2D vs 2G. Salah-led Egypt edged Group G (5 pts); Australia 2nd in D with 4 pts. Egypt's composure and Salah's invention are a class above. Egypt to advance.
fixtures.reason_zh: D 组次席对 G 组次席。萨拉赫领衔的埃及险夺 G 组次席（5 分）；澳大利亚 4 分居 D 组次席。埃及的老练与萨拉赫的创造力明显更强。埃及晋级。

fixtures.reason_en: 1J vs 2H. Argentina's perfect group (9 pts, Messi record 7th WC goal) meets Cape Verde, who scraped 2nd with 0-0 Saudi Arabia. Argentine attacking quality is in a different class; comfortable cruise to R16.
fixtures.reason_zh: J 组头名对 H 组次席。阿根廷全胜（9 分，梅西第 7 次世界杯进球创历史）迎战仅凭 0-0 沙特出线的佛得角。阿根廷进攻实力与众不同；轻松晋级 16 强。

fixtures.reason_en: 1K vs 3L. Colombia topped Group K (7 pts, including 0-0 Portugal); Ghana advanced as best-third from L with 4 pts. Díaz and Rodríguez provide creativity and the class gap is clear.
fixtures.reason_zh: K 组头名对 L 组第三。哥伦比亚夺 K 组头名（7 分，含 0-0 葡萄牙）；加纳以 L 组第三（4 分）出线。迪亚斯与罗德里格斯提供创造力，实力差距一目了然。

groups.reason_en: Mexico 1st (9 pts, unbeaten); South Africa 2nd (4 pts) — eliminated in R32 by Canada (0-1). South Korea and Czechia out.
groups.reason_zh: 墨西哥头名（9 分，全胜）；南非次席（4 分）——32 强 0-1 负加拿大出局。韩国与捷克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Switzerland 1st (7 pts, 3-1 Canada); Canada 2nd; Bosnia 3rd (best-third). Qatar eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 瑞士头名（7 分，3-1 加拿大）；加拿大次席；波黑第三（最佳第三）。卡塔尔淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Brazil 1st (7 pts, +6 GD, 3-0 Scotland); Morocco 2nd (7 pts, +3 GD, 4-2 Haiti). Scotland and Haiti eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 巴西头名（7 分，净胜球 +6，3-0 苏格兰）；摩洛哥次席（7 分，+3，4-2 海地）。苏格兰与海地淘汰。

groups.reason_en: USA 1st (6 pts, despite 2-3 Turkey); Australia 2nd (4 pts, GD 0); Paraguay 3rd (best-third, 4 pts). Turkey eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 美国头名（6 分，虽 2-3 负土耳其）；澳大利亚次席（4 分，净胜球 0）；巴拉圭第三（最佳第三，4 分）。土耳其淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Germany 1st (6 pts, GD +6); Ivory Coast 2nd (6 pts, GD +2); Ecuador 3rd (best-third). Curaçao eliminated. Note: Germany out in R32 (pens vs Paraguay).
groups.reason_zh: 德国头名（6 分，净胜球 +6）；科特迪瓦次席（6 分，+2）；厄瓜多尔第三（最佳第三）。库拉索淘汰。注：德国 32 强点球出局（负巴拉圭）。

groups.reason_en: Netherlands 1st (7 pts); Japan 2nd (5 pts); Sweden 3rd (best-third). Tunisia eliminated. Note: Netherlands out R32 (pens vs Morocco); Japan out R32 (2-1 vs Brazil).
groups.reason_zh: 荷兰头名（7 分）；日本次席（5 分）；瑞典第三（最佳第三）。突尼斯淘汰。注：荷兰 32 强点球出局；日本 32 强 1-2 负巴西。

groups.reason_en: Belgium 1st (5 pts, GD +4, 5-1 NZ); Egypt 2nd (5 pts, GD +2). Iran and New Zealand eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 比利时头名（5 分，净胜球 +4，5-1 新西兰）；埃及次席（5 分，+2）。伊朗与新西兰淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Spain 1st (7 pts, clean sheet); Cape Verde 2nd (3 pts, all draws — historic debut). Uruguay and Saudi Arabia eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 西班牙头名（7 分，零失球）；佛得角次席（3 分，三平出线——历史性首秀）。乌拉圭与沙特淘汰。

groups.reason_en: France 1st (9 pts, 4-1 Norway); Norway 2nd (6 pts, Haaland 6 goals); Senegal 3rd (best-third, 5-0 Iraq). Iraq eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 法国头名（9 分，4-1 挪威）；挪威次席（6 分，哈兰德 6 球）；塞内加尔第三（最佳第三，5-0 伊拉克）。伊拉克淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Argentina 1st (9 pts, Messi record 7th WC goal vs Jordan); Austria 2nd (4 pts, GD 0 edges Algeria); Algeria 3rd (best-third). Jordan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 阿根廷头名（9 分，梅西第 7 次世界杯进球创历史）；奥地利次席（4 分，净胜球 0 胜阿尔及利亚）；阿尔及利亚第三（最佳第三）。约旦淘汰。

groups.reason_en: Colombia 1st (7 pts, 0-0 Portugal); Portugal 2nd (5 pts, 5-0 Uzbekistan); DR Congo 3rd (best-third, 3-1 Uzbekistan). Uzbekistan eliminated.
groups.reason_zh: 哥伦比亚头名（7 分，0-0 葡萄牙）；葡萄牙次席（5 分，5-0 乌兹别克斯坦）；刚果（金）第三（最佳第三，3-1 乌兹别克斯坦）。乌兹淘汰。

groups.reason_en: England 1st (7 pts, Kane scoring); Croatia 2nd (6 pts, 2-1 Ghana); Ghana 3rd (best-third, 4 pts). Panama eliminated (0 goals).
groups.reason_zh: 英格兰头名（7 分，凯恩进球）；克罗地亚次席（6 分，2-1 加纳）；加纳第三（最佳第三，4 分）。巴拿马淘汰（0 进球）。
